siteDescription: A publicly available, temporally annotated video dataset of Japanese fingerspelling for sign language recognition and sequence modeling.
datasetTitle: An Open Dataset for Japanese Fingerspelling
datasetBody: A publicly available, temporally annotated video dataset of Japanese fingerspelling for sign language recognition and sequence modeling.
